title: Fleet Logistics Planning
summary: Ensuring sustained operations through proper supply management.
details: Ships without fuel and ammunition are useless. Plan operations around logistics constraints: fuel range, ammunition expenditure, repair needs. Position supply points safely. Calculate consumption rates before commitment. Extended operations require resupply schedule. Protect logistics ships as high-value assets. Attacking enemy logistics can win wars without fleet battles.
annotations: Amateurs study tactics, professionals study logistics.
Many campaigns lost to supply failure, not combat.
